smoke.detail: On the box (rosenbluth): `pixi install` solved endpoints/solubility/sfi with caches forced under /zfs (PIXI_CACHE_DIR=/zfs/sanjanp/fto-admet-envs/pixi-cache; nothing in $HOME, which is 97% full). pixi.lock is box-solved (linux-64 section, 182 sha256 hashes) and pins rdkit 2026.03.3 + python 3.11.15 (same conda-forge stack as t10 rdkit_crippen, cache warm). Direct smoke `pixi run --manifest-path pixi.toml python run.py --input ../../../tests/fixtures/fto43.smi --output /tmp/sfi.out.json` => finite SFI=-1.5199, cLogD_7.4=-1.5199, n_aromatic_rings=0 for the FTO-43 placeholder (acetic acid CC(=O)O): cLogP_crippen=0.0909, then base HH correction -log10(1+10^(9.0-7.4))=-1.6108 gives cLogD, and SFI=cLogD+0 rings. pka=9.0 is the F-13 PLACEHOLDER (stamped into provenance/raw with pka_source), injectable via --pka. `pixi run pytest tests/test_model_sfi.py -m model -q` => 1 passed (validates against core.schemas.OutputRecord, model==sfi, uncertainty is None, integer non-negative ring count, and the identity SFI==cLogD_7.4+n_aromatic_rings). Fast tier on box `pixi run pytest -m 'not model' -q` => 148 passed, 3 deselected (the model smoke tests). Lock rsync'd back to the laptop byte-identical (grep linux-64 => 182).

note: SFI (Solubility Forecast Index) rule for the solubility endpoint, CODE-ALGO, following the t10 folder/adapter shape. SFI = cLogD(7.4) + #aromatic rings -> single float; LOWER = better (more soluble) - inverts vs generalist log S, reconciled by the t41 aggregator (stated in README, not averaged here). Uses cLogD NOT cLogP (F-12): cLogD derived from Crippen cLogP (the t10 WLOGP lens) + a Henderson-Hasselbalch base correction; the pKa correction is not skipped. pKa is the F-13 DEFERRED placeholder (PLACEHOLDER_PKA=9.0), wired as an injectable source (--pka) with a TODO(F-13) to swap the single shared pKa source (OPERA pKa_pred / one chosen predictor) once decided - not silently pinned as if decided. uncertainty=None (the SFI-vs-generalist discrepancy is a downstream t41 signal, not native here). Invalid SMILES -> null endpoint_values + raw.error, no crash. FTO-43 fixture SMILES is the documented t09 placeholder; smoke asserts finite/plausible + the rule identity, not a hard value.
